meaning: n.(=chuffing)引擎中燃料的间歇性燃烧
examples: My crew and I have water-chugging contests.
An engine was chugging but not delivering heat.
And water chugging competitions can be deadly too.
My boyfriend stayed in the chugging cab while the grandmother and I hugged on the stoop.
Many of those that kept critical-communications chugging along despite the weather were equipped with fuel cells.
